overview.description: Web scraping and browser automation platform powering AI data pipelines for developers and enterprises
overview.description_long: Apify is the world's largest platform for web scraping and browser automation, providing 22,000+ ready-made 'Actors' (cloud-based scraping tools) for extracting web data at scale. With 25,000+ customers worldwide and 1 PB+ of data processed monthly, Apify is repositioning as core AI data infrastructure — offering an MCP server so AI agents can access web data, and providing high-quality training data for LLMs and AI applications. Crawlee, their open-source web scraping library, is a key developer-community asset.
overview.tagline: Get more value from the web

history.origin_story: Launched in 2015 from the Y Combinator Fellowship in Mountain View, California by Jan Čurn and Jakub Balada. Originally built to make flexible, scalable web crawlers using headless browser technology. In 2016, the team moved back to the Czech Republic, raised seed investment, and built a full-stack web scraping and browser automation platform.

key_milestones.event: Founded via Y Combinator Fellowship, Mountain View, CA
Returned to Czech Republic and raised seed investment
Reported $11M funding round for web scraping platform growth
Ranked in Sifted 30 fastest-growing startups in Central Europe
Launched Apify MCP server enabling AI agents to access 22,000+ web data Actors

open_roles.title: Backend Engineer for Web Automation team (Node.js)
Senior Backend Engineer for proxy and unblocking
Senior Backend Engineer for developer platform (Node.js/TypeScript)
Backend Engineer for open source frameworks (TypeScript)
Senior Product Manager for Core Product

awards: Sifted 30 fastest-growing startups in Central Europe (2024)

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Apify's core moat is its 22,000+ community-built Actors and anti-bot/proxy infrastructure at scale. While foundation models improve at web navigation, Apify's network effects (marketplace, developer ecosystem, $596k+ monthly developer payouts), anti-blocking infrastructure, and pivot to AI data/MCP integration create meaningful defensibility. However, computer-use AI agents could commoditize some scraping use cases over time.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Demand for web data is accelerating sharply with LLM training needs, AI agent pipelines, and enterprise data automation. Apify is well-positioned as core AI data infrastructure with 25,000+ paying customers. The Sifted 30 ranking and AWS partnership confirm strong market traction.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Well-funded with Reflex Capital and JT Ventures backing, a reported $11M Series A in 2021, and additional €2.8M in April 2024. With 25,000+ customers and usage-based revenue, the company likely has strong recurring revenue and is close to or at profitability.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Apify combines strong market tailwinds (AI data demand), a large customer base (25,000+), a developer ecosystem moat (22,000+ Actors), and a smart pivot toward AI infrastructure (MCP server, LLM training data). Founded in 2015 and backed by Czech VCs, it is one of the most established Czech AI/tech scaleups with durable defensibility.

metadata.notes: Founded 2015 via YC Fellowship. HQ in Lucerna Palace, Prague; second office in Brno Titanium business center. Apify calls employees 'Apifiers'. Marketplace pays out $596k+ to developers monthly. The 2021 $11M figure is from tech.eu URL slug (article body blocked by Cloudflare); the 2024 €2.8M raise confirmed via tech.eu article linked directly from apify.com/about. Investors confirmed via apify.com/about: Reflex Capital and JT Ventures. Glassdoor blocked; LinkedIn not directly scraped.
